name: Pistal
description:
The Pistal is a pistol with middling damage, poor accuracy and a very large magazine. Performance depends heavily on its barrel.

Bandit: higher damage and steadier handling, but worse accuracy.
Dahl: much lower recoil and faster accuracy recovery, but reduced damage with more shot spread.
Maliwan: slightly better accuracy and increased elemental damage.
Tediore: no notable changes.

Low-tier rolls are rarely worth using, but strong parts can make it effective at close to mid range.
notes: Drops randomly from most appropriate loot sources.
